response.justification: While Bogdan is a skilled Staff-level engineer with strong fundamentals and recent exposure to AI infrastructure work, he lacks the core expertise required for this role. The position explicitly requires 8+ years of production AI solutions experience, and his background is primarily web and backend development with only ~2 months in an AI-adjacent role starting April 2025. Critical gaps include no Python proficiency, no experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and no demonstrated LLM/generative AI work.
strengths: Staff-level engineer with proven leadership and mentoring ability across multiple companies
Strong TypeScript expertise across diverse domains and production systems
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, showing recent pivot toward GenAI
concerns: Only ~2 months of AI-related experience versus 8+ years required; career is primarily web/backend development
No Python proficiency listed (critical for AI/ML roles); has TypeScript but Python is essential for the domain
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM optimization, or multi-agent frameworks
